milestones.desc: Premix units and hammer mill series were launched to the market.

milestones.title: Market Expansion

milestones.title: Intelligent Transformation

name: Aoshihua Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
address: No. 88 Aoshihua Road, Wujin High-Tech Industrial Development Zone, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China
description: Aoshihua Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production and sales of feed machinery. With many years of industry experience, our products cover premix units, feed mixing equipment, feed dust removal equipment, hammer mills and other series, widely used in livestock and poultry feed, aquatic feed, pet feed and other fields. Driven by technological innovation and oriented by customer needs, we provide customers with one-stop services from solution design, equipment manufacturing to installation and commissioning.
slogan: Precision Manufacturing for Feed Machinery, Empowering Modern Agriculture
